description_long: This is a modern, minimalist desk lamp with a sleek, angular design. The lamp features a flat, rectangular base that provides stability, supporting a vertical stem that rises to meet a thin, elongated lamp head. The lamp head is slightly angled, likely to direct light downward onto a work surface, and has a smooth, unadorned finish. The entire structure appears to be made of metal with a matte or brushed surface, giving it a contemporary industrial look. There are no visible switches or controls, suggesting they may be touch-sensitive or integrated discreetly. The lamp's compact form and clean lines make it suitable for urban workspaces, offices, or study areas.
description: A sleek, minimalist metal desk lamp with a rectangular base, vertical stem, and angled lamp head, finished in a matte metallic tone.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rectangular base, straight vertical stem, and the flat lamp head directly above.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the angled lamp head extending forward from the vertical stem and the flat, sturdy base.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vertical stem and the thin profile of the lamp head.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the angled lamp head and the rectangular base, mirroring view 1.
